title: Image Generation Flow
activity_flow: START
Caller → ImageProvider::image(prompt, attachments=[], size=null, quality=null, model=null, timeout=null)
GeneratesImages trait handles image(): generate invocationId = Str::uuid7()
DECISION: model param null? → YES: resolve model = defaultImageModel() | NO: use provided model
Create ImagePrompt(prompt, attachments, size, quality, provider, model)
DECISION: Ai::imagesAreFaked()? → YES: Ai::recordImageGeneration(prompt) [fake path, no HTTP] | NO: continue
Dispatch event: GeneratingImage(invocationId, provider, model, prompt)
Call HasImageGateway::imageGateway() to resolve gateway instance
DECISION: $imageGateway property set (via useImageGateway)? → YES: return it | NO: return $this->gateway (or lazily create XaiImageGateway)
XaiImageGateway::generateImage(provider, model, prompt.prompt, prompt.attachments.all(), prompt.size, prompt.quality, timeout)
Set effective timeout = timeout ?? 120 (seconds)
Wrap execution in withErrorHandling(provider->name(), fn) [HandlesFailoverErrors trait]
Build HTTP client: $this->client($provider, timeout) [CreatesXaiClient concern]
POST request to XAI API: POST images/generations { model, prompt, response_format: 'b64_json' }
DECISION: HTTP/API error? → YES: HandlesFailoverErrors handles exception/failover | NO: continue
Call $response->json() to parse JSON body
Extract b64_json: $response['data'][0]['b64_json']
Create GeneratedImage(b64_json, 'image/jpeg')
Wrap in Illuminate Collection([GeneratedImage])
Create Usage object (empty/default)
Create Meta(provider->name(), model)
Return new ImageResponse(Collection<GeneratedImage>, Usage, Meta)
Back in GeneratesImages::image(): tap() receives ImageResponse
Dispatch event: ImageGenerated(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response)
Return ImageResponse to Caller
END
key_relationships: XaiProvider uses GeneratesImages (trait) — provides image() method
XaiProvider uses HasImageGateway (trait) — provides imageGateway() / useImageGateway()
HasImageGateway holds optional ImageGateway $imageGateway, falls back to $this->gateway
XaiImageGateway uses HandlesFailoverErrors (wraps call with error handling)
GeneratedImage wraps base64 image string + mime type
decision_points: model param null → use defaultImageModel() (XaiProvider: 'grok-imagine-image' from config or default)
Ai::imagesAreFaked() → record fake, skip real HTTP call
imageGateway property set → use custom; else lazy-create XaiImageGateway
HTTP/API error in withErrorHandling → failover error handling (exception or retry)
interfaces_and_contracts: ImageProvider::image(prompt, attachments, size, quality, model, timeout): ImageResponse
ImageGateway::generateImage(provider, model, prompt, attachments, size, quality, timeout): ImageResponse

data_objects.ImagePrompt: prompt (string), attachments (Collection), size ('3:2'|'2:3'|'1:1'|null), quality ('low'|'medium'|'high'|null), provider (ImageProvider), model (string)
data_objects.GeneratedImage: image (string, base64), mime (string, e.g. 'image/jpeg'); implements Arrayable, JsonSerializable; uses Storable trait
data_objects.ImageResponse: images (Collection<GeneratedImage>), usage (Usage), meta (Meta); implements Countable, Htmlable

events_dispatched: GeneratingImage(invocationId, provider, model, prompt) — before gateway call
ImageGenerated(invocationId, provider, model, prompt, response) — after successful gateway response

xai_api_details.note: Size and quality params accepted by interface but XaiProvider::defaultImageOptions returns [] (not sent to API)

important_notes: GeneratesImages trait is the central orchestrator — it handles UUID generation, fake detection, event dispatch, and delegates to ImageGateway. HasImageGateway allows runtime gateway swapping via useImageGateway(). OpenAiProvider follows the same pattern with its own OpenAiImageGateway. XaiImageGateway does NOT forward size/quality to the XAI API (they are accepted but ignored).
